owner: foreign key string email address of user who owns character
campaign: foreign key string ID of campaign record, not required
imgUrl: STRING PATH TO CHARACTER PORTRAIT JPG OR PNG
domains: Array of Strings for each Domain
skills: Array of Strings for each Skill
doom: Positive INT between 0 and 5 of current DOOM on the DOOM tracker
bodyStress: Boolean of whether body stress is marked
speedStress: Boolean of whether speed stress is marked
mindStress: Boolean of whether mind stress is marked
spiritStress: Boolean of whether spirit stress is marked
